title: Don’t miss this Claude update
summary: Claude Opus 4.8 introduces Dynamic Workflows, which enables the model to launch hundreds of subagents simultaneously within a single session. The system automatically plans work, splits tasks, and coordinates parallel execution with built-in verification, designed for large codebases, cross-file research, and complex multi-step tasks.
writeup: The video covers Claude Opus 4.8 and its Dynamic Workflows feature, which launches hundreds of subagents at once inside a single session. The system auto-generates task plans, splits work across parallel agents, and runs verification through a separate QA crew. The result is that complex multi-part operations finish faster than running tasks one after another. The key shift is built-in agent orchestration with parallelism and a dedicated verification layer rather than sequential execution.
